
```{r}
set.seed(1)
pacman::p_load(cmdstanr, tidyverse, cowplot)
theme_set(theme_minimal())
```

```{r}
agent.PBA <- Vectorize(function(
    alpha_prior,
    beta_prior,
    own_rating,
    external_rating,
    own_weighting,
    external_weighting
) {
    alpha_post <- alpha_prior + own_weighting * (own_rating - 1) + (1 - own_weighting) * (external_rating - 1)
    beta_post  <- beta_prior  + own_weighting * (8 - own_rating) + (1 - own_weighting) * (8 - external_rating)
    
    1 + sum(rbinom(1, size = 7, prob = rbeta(1, alpha_post, beta_post)))
})

agent.WBA <- Vectorize(function(
    alpha_prior,
    beta_prior,
    own_rating,
    external_rating,
    own_weighting,
    external_weighting
) {
    alpha_post <- alpha_prior + own_weighting * (own_rating - 1) + external_weighting * (external_rating - 1)
    beta_post  <- beta_prior  + own_weighting * (8 - own_rating) + external_weighting * (8 - external_rating)
    
    1 + sum(rbinom(1, size = 7, prob = rbeta(1, alpha_post, beta_post)))
})

simulate <- function(
    agent_evaluator,
    n_observations,
    alpha_prior,
    beta_prior,
    own_rating,
    external_rating,
    own_weighting,
    external_weighting
) {
  tibble(
    FaceID=seq(1, n_observations),
    FirstRating=round(runif(n_observations, 1, 8)),
    GroupRating=round(runif(n_observations, 1, 8)),
  ) |> mutate(
    SecondRating=agent_evaluator(
        alpha_prior=alpha_prior,
        beta_prior=beta_prior,
        own_rating=FirstRating,
        external_rating=GroupRating,
        own_weighting=own_weighting,
        external_weighting=external_weighting
    ),
  )
}

simulation <- simulate(
    agent_evaluator=agent.PBA,
    n_observations=50,
    alpha_prior=0.5,
    beta_prior=0.5,
    own_weighting=0.5,
    external_weighting=NA
  ) |> mutate(
      Feedback=GroupRating-FirstRating,
      Change=SecondRating-FirstRating,
      AbsChange=abs(SecondRating-FirstRating)
  )

# for (Participant in 1:20) {
#   simulation <- rbind(simulation, simulate(
#     agent_evaluator=agent.PBA,
#     n_observations=50,
#     alpha_prior=0.5,
#     beta_prior=0.5,
#     own_weighting=0.5,
#     external_weighting=NA
#   ) |> mutate(
#       AgentID=Participant,
#       AgentType="PBA",
#       Feedback=GroupRating-FirstRating,
#       Change=SecondRating-FirstRating,
#       AbsChange=abs(SecondRating-FirstRating)
#   ))
# }

simulation
```

```{r}
model <- cmdstan_model("./stan/PBA.stan", cpp_options=list(stan_threads=FALSE))

model_fit <- model$sample(
  data = list(
    N=nrow(simulation),
    FirstRating=simulation$FirstRating,
    GroupRating=simulation$GroupRating,
    SecondRating=simulation$SecondRating
  ),
  seed = 0,
  chains = 4,
  iter_sampling = 1000,
  iter_warmup = 1000,
  refresh = 0
)
```


```{r}
ggplot(simulation) +
  geom_jitter(aes(x=Feedback, y=Change), width=0.2, height=0.2, shape=1)
```


```{r fig.width = 10}
simulation |> head(20) |>  ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x=FaceID, y=FirstRating, yend=SecondRating), 
    arrow=arrow(type="closed", length = unit(0.4, "cm"))
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x=FaceID, y=FirstRating), 
    color="black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x=FaceID, y=GroupRating),
    color="red"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(1, 8)) +
  labs(y="Rating")
```





```{r}
simulation |> pivot_longer(
  cols=c(FirstRating, GroupRating, SecondRating),
  names_to="Observation",
  values_to="Rating",
) |> ggplot(aes(x=Rating)) +
  geom_bar() +
  stat_summary(aes(xintercept = after_stat(x), y = 0), fun = mean, geom = "vline", orientation = "y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(1, 8)) +
  facet_wrap(~Observation) +
  labs(y="Observation count")

simulation |> pivot_longer(
  cols=c(Feedback, Change, AbsChange),
  names_to="Observation",
  values_to="Offset",
) |> ggplot(aes(x=Offset)) +
  geom_bar() +
  stat_summary(aes(xintercept = after_stat(x), y = 0), fun = mean, geom = "vline", orientation = "y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-7, 7), limits=c(-7, 7)) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(Observation, c("Feedback", "Change", "AbsChange"))) +
  labs(y="Observation count")
```
